notes: DS18B20 uses a Dallas 1-Wire data line with reset/presence pulse, bit slots, Skip ROM command, Convert T command, and Read Scratchpad command.
The data pin must be switchable between output drive and input sampling with microsecond-scale delay support.

optional_attachment.pull_up: external or board pull-up required by the 1-Wire bus

protocol_hints.temperature_encoding: signed little-endian 16-bit raw count, 1 LSB = 0.0625 degC
protocol_hints.crc: Dallas/Maxim CRC8 over first 8 scratchpad bytes

notes: Reference drivers use Skip ROM for a single-drop bus and wait for conversion before reading the scratchpad.
